topics.name: 头颈肿瘤
topics.query: ("head and neck cancer" OR "head and neck squamous cell carcinoma" OR oropharyngeal OR laryngeal OR hypopharyngeal OR nasopharyngeal OR "oral cavity cancer" OR "salivary gland cancer") AND (guideline OR consensus OR "clinical practice guideline" OR immunotherapy OR "targeted therapy" OR de-escalation OR surveillance)

topics.name: 甲状腺与颈部肿块
topics.query: (thyroid nodule OR differentiated thyroid cancer OR follicular thyroid carcinoma OR follicular neoplasm OR NIFTP OR Bethesda OR "molecular testing" OR "neck mass") AND (guideline OR consensus OR "risk stratification" OR lobectomy OR "active surveillance" OR "radioactive iodine")

topics.name: 耳科与听力
topics.query: ("sudden sensorineural hearing loss" OR otitis media OR cholesteatoma OR cochlear implant OR vestibular schwannoma OR "Meniere disease" OR BPPV OR vertigo OR tinnitus OR otology OR neurotology OR tympanoplasty OR mastoidectomy) AND (guideline OR consensus OR "systematic review" OR "clinical trial" OR "randomized trial")

topics.name: 鼻科与变态反应
topics.query: (chronic rhinosinusitis OR nasal polyps OR allergic rhinitis OR endoscopic sinus surgery OR epistaxis OR olfaction OR rhinology OR sinusitis OR skull base OR "anterior skull base") AND (guideline OR consensus OR EPOS OR ICAR OR biologic OR dupilumab OR "systematic review" OR "clinical trial")

topics.name: 咽喉、气道与睡眠
topics.query: (vocal fold OR dysphonia OR laryngology OR laryngeal OR dysphagia OR tracheostomy OR "upper airway" OR obstructive sleep apnea OR tonsillectomy OR adenoidectomy) AND (guideline OR consensus OR "clinical practice guideline" OR "systematic review" OR "randomized trial")

topics.name: 儿童耳鼻咽喉
topics.query: (pediatric OR children OR child) AND (otolaryngology OR otitis media OR hearing loss OR tonsillectomy OR adenoidectomy OR cholesteatoma OR airway OR thyroid nodule OR neck mass OR sinusitis) AND (guideline OR consensus OR "clinical practice guideline" OR "systematic review")

topics.name: 综合指南、围手术期与技术进展
topics.query: (otolaryngology OR "head and neck surgery" OR "facial plastic surgery" OR skull base OR parotidectomy OR thyroidectomy OR laryngectomy OR tympanoplasty OR mastoidectomy OR "endoscopic ear surgery") AND (guideline OR consensus OR "clinical practice guideline" OR "systematic review" OR "randomized trial" OR perioperative OR complication OR "quality improvement")
